hero.title: Welcome to our Association of Latin American countries
hero.subtitle: you can count on our support

Events.title: Upcoming Events
Events.description: We are working on new experiences

About.title: About Us
About.introText1: We are a team dedicated to providing support, solutions and opportunities.
About.introText2: We love representing our Latin American culture.

history.title: Our History
history.content1: The Association of Latin American Countries of Kazan was born in 2022 as a result of the joint effort of several Latin American students living in the city.
history.content2: Over time, they identified the need for an organization that would unite Latin American students to promote their talents and culture.
history.milestone2: 2024: First Latin America Day and first sporting event

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: Our mission is to support and accompany Latin American students during their adaptation in Russia.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.statement: In the near future we see ourselves consolidating as a leading association in Kazan for Latin American students.

values.title: Our Values
values.value1Desc: We act with honesty and transparency in everything we do.
values.value2Desc: We constantly seek ways to showcase our culture.
values.value3Desc: We strive for the highest quality in all our events.
values.value4Desc: We care about supporting our Latin American students.
values.value5Desc: We value collaboration and mutual respect.

swing.title: Dance Collective
swing.description1: Immerse yourself in the infectious energy of tropical music.
swing.description2: We have a family atmosphere where passion for dance unites us.

voces.title: Singing Group
voces.description1: Revaluing the musical roots of Latin America through experiential workshops.
voces.description2: Learn charango, quena and vocal harmonies.

footer.text: © 2023 Latin American Student Association in Russia
